name: S-14 standards-add --tree scaffolds <tree>/<namespace>/<id>.yaml in addition to the registry append (G-9 chain)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://example.com/foo.html --id example-foo --tree tree && [ -s tree/example/example-foo.yaml ] && grep -q '^source:' tree/example/example-foo.yaml && echo scaffolded 1>&2
